narrative: US-Iran escalation risk and potential Strait of Hormuz disruptions drive a geopolitical risk premium as WTI nears $95; USD/CHF approaches two-month lows at 0.7781 while gold firmed +0.48% near $4,733. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence is the week's dominant G8 theme (1.30% spread) as NZD leads (+0.68%) and CAD lags (-0.62%) ahead of domestic jobs data. Equities lower -0.38%; DXY -0.12%; VIX 17.1. Watch US Nonfarm Payrolls at 12:30 UTC for the next macro directional catalyst.
